prestazioni: MZEA12 1.5L 3-cylinder turbo (G16E-GTS derived) hybrid system removal with full standalone ECU conversion using a Haltech Elite 2500, paired with a Garrett GT2259 turbo upgrade (58mm compressor, 62mm turbine) and custom 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Tomei for optimized spool and 280whp target

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Yaris Cross GR Sport-specific valving) with 20mm front and 15mm rear adjustable ride height, reinforced top mounts by Cusco, and polyurethane subframe bushings by SuperPro (P/N SPF0115K) for chassis rigidity

Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (355mm discs, P/N 09.9455.11) with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines, paired with 2-piston rear calipers (316mm discs) for balanced braking performance
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Yaris Cross GR Sport-specific fitment) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, finished in custom matte Toyota Performance Red (P/N 040)

Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,800mm width, 3D carbon construction) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle (0-15 degrees) for downforce tuning, paired with a custom front canard set by Seibon Carbon

OEM+ GRMN-style headlight conversion with Morimoto XB LED projectors (5,000K), sequential LED turn signals by Diode Dynamics, and custom smoked taillight overlays with integrated sequential brake lights (Vland P/N VL-TYC12-LED)
